channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-14856] sanity: test_812b lfs quota should succeed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for paf <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/41988783-f163-42b5-a88c-99710d58f99c

== sanity test 812b: do not drop no resend request for idle connect ================================== 01:58:21 (1626400701)
CMD: trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_min
CMD: trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh wait_import_state FULL osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff80006ebba800.ost_server_uuid 40
CMD: trevis-25vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-25vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-211vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state FULL osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff80006ebba800.ost_server_uuid 40
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff80006ebba800.ost_server_uuid in FULL state after 0 sec
CMD: trevis-211vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param fail_loc=0x245 fail_val=8
fail_loc=0x245
fail_val=8
CMD: trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_min
CMD: trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh wait_import_state CONNECTING osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff80006ebba800.ost_server_uuid 40
CMD: trevis-25vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-25vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-211vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state CONNECTING osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff80006ebba800.ost_server_uuid 40
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff80006ebba800.ost_server_uuid in CONNECTING state after 16 sec
CMD: trevis-211vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param fail_loc=0 fail_val=0
fail_loc=0
fail_val=0
Disk quotas for usr 0 (uid 0):
Filesystem kbytes quota limit grace files quota limit grace
/mnt/lustre/ [25004] 0 0 - 9655 0 0 -
Some errors happened when getting quota info. Some devices may be not working or deactivated. The data in "[]" is inaccurate.
sanity test_812b: @@@@@@ FAIL: lfs quota should succeed
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6220:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:26447:test_812b()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6523:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6570:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6412:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:26450:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2021-07-15/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-arm_81974_1_17_f2bd5dbd-d70e-45db-8a60-bf4c108102a7/sanity.test_812b.*.1626400742.log
CMD: trevis-211vm1,trevis-25vm1,trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-79vm16 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2021-07-15/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-arm_81974_1_17_f2bd5dbd-d70e-45db-8a60-bf4c108102a7/sanity.test_812b.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1626400742.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2021-07-15/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-arm_81974_1_17_f2bd5dbd-d70e-45db-8a60-bf4c108102a7/sanity.test_812b.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1626400742.log
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...CMD: trevis-211vm1,trevis-25vm1,trevis-79vm15.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-79vm16 lctl set_param -n fail_loc=0 fail_val=0 2>/dev/null
item.summary: sanity: test_812b lfs quota should succeed

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
